non_citizen_exemptions.reason: live continuation capture handle; descriptor data is the continuation and capture refs
control result ref wrapper; canonical data is the referenced value
dynamic ISLISP instance shell; canonical data is the class symbol and slot table
live logic database state; reconstruct from asserted facts and rules
live logic configuration state; reconstruct from logic query configuration data
live logic answer stream; reconstruct from query and logic/Db descriptor data
mutable cell handle; reconstruct from the current value plus mutation policy
mutable box handle; reconstruct from the current value plus mutation policy
mutable table handle; reconstruct from table entries plus mutation policy
mutable vector handle; reconstruct from vector entries plus mutation policy
dynamic ADT variant value; canonical data is the variant symbol and field table
live lazy sequence producer; reconstruct from the source sequence expression
persistent vector wrapper; canonical form is native Expr::Vector data
persistent set wrapper; canonical form is native Expr::Set data
profile sequence adapter; reconstruct from the profile symbol and source sequence descriptor
transduced sequence adapter; reconstruct from the source sequence and transducer pipeline descriptor
